form.formComment: Gelding by Deep Field making his first appearance. Trialled on March 17 at Beaumont (Newcastle) over 1000m and finished fifth. Betting best guide.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Gelding by Deep Field making his first appearance. Trialled on March 17 at Beaumont (Newcastle) over 1000m and finished fifth. Betting best guide.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of five months. Finished off last campaign fifth of 10 at Grafton Ctry Mdn November 5 over 1700m, 2 len behind Da Silva Gold carrying 56kg at $26. When resuming last campaign ran last of 12 at Port Macquarie Super Mdn-Sw September 28 over 1509m, 17 len behind The Warrior carrying 59kg at $151. Plenty of more attractive propositions in this race.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming 3rd of 9 at Newcastle 3yo+ Mdn-Hcp on February 28 over 900m, on a slow track; 2.75 len behind Precious Girl carrying 55.5kg at $13. Last start 2nd of 9 at Port Macquarie Cge Mdn-Sw on March 16 over 1206m, nose behind Rockbarton Spear carrying 59kg at $6. Peaking now will be hard to hold out.

Previously first up; seventh of 9 at Muswellbrook 4yo+ Mdn-Sw November 4 over 1000m, 8 len behind Wanavan with 59kg at $71. Prefer to see how he has returned.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Resuming after a spell of six months. Finished off last preparation second last of 7 at Newcastle Mid Cl1 October 18 over 1250m, soft track; 8 len behind Gunroom carrying 55kg at $101. First up last campaign 11th of 13 at Scone Mdn September 26 over 1100m, 10 len behind Land Bank with 56kg at $81. Expecting a bright return.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Returns from a 40-day let-up. Last start held ground to the line 3rd of 8 at Gold Coast Mdn on February 28 over 1300m, on a wet track; 5 len behind Britannia Rose with 54.5kg at $17. The start before that 2nd in a small field at Gold Coast Poly Mdn-Sw on February 14 over 1150m, 2.75 len behind Decadad with 55.5kg at $3.50. Going well and expected to be competitive again.
